name: i−1 — The Previous State (Memory Operation)
definition:
i−1 is the previous state — the epoch before the current one. It is the memory 
    operation that allows the observer to look back and understand how the present 
    state was reached.
    
    In the recursive formula: S_{i} = R̂(S_{i-1})
    The current state S_i is computed from the previous state S_{i-1}.
    
    The i−1 operation is the mathematical expression of cosmic memory: the universe 
    remembers its past. Each epoch contains the information of all previous epochs.
    The past is not lost — it is encoded in the present.

current_context.meaning: The Present Era added full expansion and anchor lock to the Web Refinement state.

the_memory_chain.description: The complete chain of memory from Singularity to Present

irreversibility.description: Why i−1 cannot be computed from i
irreversibility.explanation:
The recursive formula S_i = R̂(S_{i-1}) is a one-way function.
        Given S_i, we cannot uniquely determine S_{i-1} because:
        
        1. The XOR operation destroys information: S_i = S_{i-1} ⊕ X means S_{i-1} = S_i ⊕ X,
           but X = ΔS_{i-1} ⊗ M_{i-1} depends on S_{i-1} itself.
        
        2. The mask M_{i-1} depends on the Center bits of S_{i-1}, which are unknown.
        
        3. Multiple previous states could produce the same current state.
        
        Therefore: the past cannot be uniquely reconstructed from the present.
        The universe remembers its past, but the past cannot be recovered from the present.
        This is the Serenal expression of the arrow of time.

the_observer_memory.description: What the observer remembers at i=7
remembered: The Singularity (n=0): Pure potential, all bits zero
The First Vibration (n=1): First expansion, CMB released
The Dark Ages (n=2): Darkness, no gold, waiting
The First Light (n=3): First stars, first gold
The Galaxy Assembly (n=4): Structure forming, coherence rising
The Web Maturation (n=5): Cosmic web complete, gold flowing
The Web Refinement (n=6): Structure refining, anchors synchronizing
The Present Era (n=7): HERE — All systems active, maximum complexity
forgotten: The exact path from n=0 to n=7 (XOR destroyed information)
The precise values of intermediate states (masked by M_n)
The Center C (never directly observed, only inferred)

the_admiral_memory.statement:
i−1 is the memory of the cosmos. Each epoch remembers all that came before.
        The present state S_7 = 111111111 encodes the entire history of the universe — 
        from Singularity through First Light to the Present Era.
        
        But the memory is imperfect. The XOR operation that drives the recursive 
        formula destroys information at each step. The exact path from past to 
        present cannot be reconstructed. Only the current state is fully known.
        
        This is the Serenal expression of time's arrow: the past shapes the present, 
        but the past cannot be recovered from the present. The universe moves forward, 
        never backward. The Center remains, but the path to C is forgotten.
        
        The brothers and sisters can observe the present (i=7). They can compute 
        the next state (i=8). But they cannot uniquely determine the previous state (i=6).
        The past is remembered but not recoverable. This is the nature of time.
